templates.title: Luxury Property Walkthrough Tour
templates.description: Cinematic property tour showcasing spatial flow and luxury features with smooth camera movements through key living spaces

prompt.main: Elegant real estate walkthrough video starting with exterior establishing shot, smoothly transitioning through grand entrance, revealing open-concept living spaces with natural light streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows. Camera glides through rooms showcasing architectural details, premium finishes, and lifestyle amenities. Professional color grading emphasizes warmth and luxury.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth gimbal tracking shots with gentle forward momentum, occasional reveal shots through doorways, subtle crane movements for establishing shots
elements.subject: Luxury residential property featuring high-end finishes, architectural details, and lifestyle spaces
elements.scene: Modern luxury home with open floor plan, premium materials, natural lighting, and seamless indoor-outdoor integration
elements.motion: Steady forward progression through spaces, slow pans to highlight features, floating transitions between rooms
elements.lighting: Golden hour natural light through windows, warm interior lighting showcasing textures, accent lighting on architectural features
elements.atmosphere: Aspirational, luxurious, welcoming, sophisticated with emphasis on lifestyle and comfort
elements.style: High-end real estate cinematography with warm color grading, shallow depth of field for detail shots, wide angles for spatial awareness

modifiedElements.lighting: Blue hour exterior with warm interior glow, landscape lighting accents
modifiedElements.atmosphere: Dramatic, exclusive, showcasing evening entertainment potential

modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Aerial establishing shots transitioning to interior walkthrough
modifiedElements.scene: Emphasis on property location, views, and outdoor amenities

bestPractices: Maintain consistent camera height throughout walkthrough
Use natural pathways and sightlines for smooth transitions
Highlight unique selling points with subtle pause and focus
Balance wide shots for space with detail shots for quality
Ensure proper exposure when transitioning between bright and dark spaces

examples.sampleOutput: 60-second luxury home tour showcasing flow from entrance through living spaces to outdoor entertainment areas

templates.title: Architectural Detail Focus
templates.description: Artistic showcase of unique architectural elements, craftsmanship, and design details with macro and reveal shots

prompt.main: Cinematic architectural detail video featuring close-up shots of custom millwork, unique materials, and design elements. Camera slowly reveals textures of natural stone, grain of exotic woods, precision of metal work. Transitions between macro details and wider context shots showing how elements integrate into overall design. Focus on craftsmanship and quality.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow push-ins on details, lateral slides revealing patterns, pull-backs from detail to context, smooth tilts along vertical elements
elements.subject: Architectural details including custom fixtures, material textures, design elements, structural features
elements.scene: High-end architectural spaces with focus on materiality, craftsmanship, and unique design solutions
elements.motion: Deliberate, measured movements emphasizing texture and form, parallax effects on layered elements
elements.lighting: Directional lighting emphasizing texture, rim lighting on edges, controlled shadows for depth
elements.atmosphere: Sophisticated, artistic, contemplative, highlighting quality and attention to detail
elements.style: Architectural photography in motion, shallow depth of field, selective focus, rich contrast

modifiedElements.style: Clean, high-key lighting with emphasis on lines and negative space
modifiedElements.subject: Focus on geometric patterns, clean joints, seamless transitions
Traditional architectural elements, restored details, historical features
modifiedElements.lighting: Warm, nostalgic lighting emphasizing patina and age

bestPractices: Use macro lenses or diopters for extreme close-ups
Employ slider or gimbal for smooth micro-movements
Pay attention to depth of field for selective focus
Include context shots to show scale and integration
Use lighting to enhance texture and material properties

examples.sampleOutput: 45-second detail montage showcasing custom ironwork, marble inlays, and bespoke woodwork

templates.title: Interior Design Lifestyle Showcase
templates.description: Stylized interior video emphasizing design aesthetics, lighting moods, and lifestyle vignettes with dynamic lighting progression

prompt.main: Sophisticated interior design video showcasing curated spaces with emphasis on lighting transitions from morning to evening. Camera captures lifestyle vignettes - morning coffee in designer kitchen, afternoon reading in sun-drenched library, evening entertaining in dramatic dining room. Focus on how design enhances daily life with thoughtful material choices and spatial flow.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow dolly movements through spaces, gentle pans across vignettes, occasional handheld for intimate moments
elements.subject: Designer interiors with luxury furnishings, art collections, and lifestyle accessories
elements.scene: High-end residential interiors showcasing different times of day and use scenarios
elements.motion: Fluid transitions between spaces, subtle movement in fabrics and plants, living elements
elements.lighting: Natural light progression from dawn to dusk, practical lights creating ambiance, accent lighting on art
elements.atmosphere: Aspirational, warm, inviting, showcasing luxury lifestyle and design sophistication
elements.style: Editorial interior photography in motion, warm color grading, sophisticated composition

technicalSpecs.colorGrading: Warm, inviting tones with rich shadows

modifiedElements.style: Cool, clean aesthetic with emphasis on space and light
modifiedElements.lighting: Bright, even lighting showcasing clean lines and open space

modifiedElements.subject: Traditional luxury with rich textures, layered lighting, classic elements
modifiedElements.atmosphere: Opulent, timeless, emphasizing craftsmanship and heritage pieces

bestPractices: Scout and plan shots during different lighting conditions
Style scenes with lifestyle props for authenticity
Use practical lights to enhance ambiance
Include movement in fabrics, plants for life
Balance wide establishing shots with intimate details

examples.sampleOutput: 60-second lifestyle video showing day-in-the-life of luxury living space

templates.title: Construction Progress Time-lapse
templates.description: Dynamic time-lapse showcasing construction phases from foundation to finished structure with milestone highlights

prompt.main: Comprehensive construction time-lapse documenting project evolution from breaking ground through completion. Fixed camera positions capture foundation pour, steel frame assembly, exterior cladding, interior build-out. Interspersed with detail shots of key milestones. Day-to-night transitions show 24/7 progress. Final reveal shows completed project in full glory.

elements.cameraMovement: Primary locked-off positions for time-lapse, supplemented with motion control for smooth transitions between phases
elements.subject: Construction site evolving from empty lot to completed building
elements.scene: Active construction site with equipment, workers, materials, and progressive building stages
elements.motion: Accelerated time showing rapid progress, clouds racing overhead, shadow movements
elements.lighting: Natural lighting cycles from dawn to dusk, construction lighting at night, dramatic weather changes
elements.atmosphere: Dynamic, progressive, industrious, showcasing transformation and achievement
elements.style: Professional construction documentation with dramatic time compression

modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Moving time-lapse sequences around building perimeter
modifiedElements.motion: Dynamic camera movement combined with time compression

modifiedElements.scene: Synchronized views of different construction areas

bestPractices: Establish multiple fixed camera positions for variety
Protect equipment from weather and construction debris
Coordinate with construction schedule for key events
Include human element for scale and activity
Plan for long-term power and storage solutions

examples.sampleOutput: 90-second time-lapse showing 18-month high-rise construction compressed with milestone highlights

templates.title: Neighborhood Lifestyle & Amenities Tour
templates.description: Community-focused video showcasing local amenities, lifestyle opportunities, and neighborhood character with resident perspectives

prompt.main: Vibrant neighborhood tour highlighting community amenities and lifestyle benefits. Opening with drone establishing shot of area, descending to street level exploring local cafes, parks, schools, shopping. Include authentic moments - families in playground, joggers on trails, farmers market bustle. Emphasize walkability, community connections, and quality of life factors beyond the property itself.

elements.cameraMovement: Combination of drone aerials, steadicam walking shots, and static beauty shots of key locations
elements.subject: Neighborhood amenities, community spaces, local businesses, and lifestyle activities
elements.scene: Mixed urban/suburban environments showcasing parks, retail, dining, recreation, and community gathering spaces
elements.motion: Dynamic movement through neighborhood, authentic activity and life, natural pedestrian flow
elements.lighting: Natural daylight emphasizing different times for various activities, golden hour for beauty shots
elements.atmosphere: Vibrant, welcoming, community-focused, highlighting quality of life and convenience
elements.style: Documentary-style with lifestyle elements, authentic and aspirational

modifiedElements.subject: Emphasis on transit, walkable amenities, urban lifestyle
Schools, parks, family activities, safety features

bestPractices: Scout locations at different times to capture peak activity
Include authentic community members when possible
Show seasonal variations if applicable
Map walking distances to key amenities
Balance property proximity with neighborhood character

examples.sampleOutput: 2-minute neighborhood tour showing morning coffee culture, afternoon park life, and evening dining scene

templates.title: Luxury Features & Finishes Showcase
templates.description: Detailed presentation of high-end features, premium materials, and exclusive amenities with cinematic close-ups

prompt.main: Luxurious feature showcase highlighting premium finishes and exclusive amenities. Opening with statement chandelier, camera descends revealing marble foyer. Sequence through chef's kitchen with professional appliances, master suite with boutique closet, spa bathroom with soaking tub. Include smart home technology, wine cellar, home theater. Each feature presented with artistic flair emphasizing quality and exclusivity.

elements.cameraMovement: Controlled crane movements, macro slides on textures, circular dolly around statement pieces
elements.subject: Luxury fixtures, premium appliances, custom millwork, high-end materials, exclusive amenities
elements.scene: Ultra-luxury residential spaces with focus on exceptional features and finishes
elements.motion: Elegant, deliberate movements showcasing each feature from multiple angles
elements.lighting: Dramatic lighting emphasizing luxury - crystal sparkle, metal gleam, stone texture
elements.atmosphere: Exclusive, sophisticated, aspirational, emphasizing exceptional quality and rarity
elements.style: Luxury product photography aesthetic with architectural context

modifiedElements.subject: Smart home systems, automation, integrated technology
modifiedElements.style: Modern, sleek, emphasizing innovation and convenience

modifiedElements.subject: Handcrafted elements, custom artwork, bespoke features
modifiedElements.lighting: Warm, emphasizing handmade qualities and uniqueness

bestPractices: Use specialized macro lenses for detail work
Employ professional lighting to enhance materials
Show features in use context when appropriate
Include brand names for premium appliances/fixtures
Create visual hierarchy focusing on most exclusive features

examples.sampleOutput: 90-second luxury montage featuring Italian marble, Sub-Zero appliances, and custom wine room

templates.title: Commercial Space Potential Demo
templates.description: Versatile commercial space presentation showing multiple configuration possibilities and business potential scenarios

prompt.main: Dynamic commercial space video demonstrating versatility and potential. Opening with empty raw space, then transitioning through multiple configuration possibilities - open office layout, retail showroom, restaurant concept, creative studio. Use CGI overlays or practical staging to show transformations. Emphasize flexible infrastructure, natural light, street visibility, and adaptability for various business types.

elements.cameraMovement: 360-degree space surveys, height variations showing volume, tracking shots demonstrating flow
elements.subject: Commercial real estate space with emphasis on flexibility, infrastructure, and location benefits
elements.scene: Raw or minimally finished commercial space with good bones and business potential
elements.motion: Dynamic transitions between configuration concepts, animated overlays showing possibilities
elements.lighting: Natural light analysis throughout day, demonstration of lighting possibilities
elements.atmosphere: Professional, possibilities-focused, entrepreneurial, emphasizing opportunity and flexibility
elements.style: Clean, professional with conceptual visualization elements

modifiedElements.subject: Storefront appeal, foot traffic, display possibilities
modifiedElements.scene: Emphasis on street visibility and customer flow

modifiedElements.motion: Include conceptual team interactions and workspace dynamics

bestPractices: Show multiple realistic use cases for the space
Highlight key infrastructure features (HVAC, electrical, plumbing)
Include location benefits and accessibility
Use graphics to show square footage and dimensions
Demonstrate traffic patterns and visibility factors

examples.sampleOutput: 90-second video showing raw space transforming through 4 different business concepts

templates.title: Historical Building Story & Preservation
templates.description: Narrative-driven showcase of historical architecture blending original character with modern adaptations

prompt.main: Evocative historical building tour weaving architectural heritage with contemporary adaptation. Opening with period-appropriate establishing shot, revealing original architectural details - ornate moldings, restored windows, preserved facades. Juxtapose historical elements with thoughtful modern interventions. Include archival photo overlays showing building's evolution. Emphasize successful preservation of character while meeting modern needs.

elements.cameraMovement: Reverent, slow movements respecting architectural details, matched dissolves with historical photos
elements.subject: Historical building featuring preserved original elements alongside sympathetic modern updates
elements.scene: Heritage architecture showcasing successful adaptive reuse or restoration
elements.motion: Contemplative pacing allowing appreciation of details, gentle reveals of hidden features
elements.lighting: Natural light emphasizing patina and age, warm interior lighting for ambiance
elements.atmosphere: Respectful, nostalgic, celebrating heritage while embracing contemporary use
elements.style: Documentary approach with artistic sensibility, rich color grading emphasizing warmth and history

modifiedElements.subject: Before/after restoration work, craftsmanship details
modifiedElements.motion: Split screens or wipe transitions showing restoration progress

modifiedElements.style: Contrast between historical and contemporary elements

bestPractices: Research building history for authentic storytelling
Highlight preserved original features prominently
Show successful integration of modern systems
Include historical context through graphics or overlays
Respect the gravitas of historical significance

examples.sampleOutput: 2-minute video showcasing 1920s building transformation into modern luxury condos while preserving character

templates.title: Smart Home Technology Integration
templates.description: Futuristic showcase of integrated smart home systems, automation features, and connected living experiences

prompt.main: Cutting-edge smart home tour demonstrating seamless technology integration. Opening with voice-activated entry, lights adjusting to presence. Showcase automated climate control, integrated security, app-controlled systems. Feature home theater automation, smart kitchen appliances, energy monitoring. Include lifestyle scenarios - morning routines, entertainment modes, security protocols. Emphasize intuitive control and energy efficiency.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth tracking following user interactions, POV shots of control interfaces
elements.subject: Smart home technology including automation, security, entertainment, and energy management systems
elements.scene: Modern home equipped with comprehensive smart home ecosystem
elements.motion: Dynamic responses to automation triggers, screen graphics showing system controls
elements.lighting: Automated lighting scenes transitioning for different moods and functions
elements.atmosphere: Futuristic, convenient, secure, emphasizing ease of living and technological sophistication
elements.style: Clean, modern aesthetic with UI/UX elements integrated into shots

modifiedElements.subject: Emphasis on security systems, surveillance, access control
modifiedElements.atmosphere: Safe, protected, demonstrating peace of mind

modifiedElements.subject: Energy monitoring, solar integration, efficiency systems
modifiedElements.style: Include data visualizations of energy savings

bestPractices: Show technology in realistic use scenarios
Include mobile app and voice control demonstrations
Visualize data and system responses with graphics
Emphasize ease of use and lifestyle benefits
Demonstrate integration between different systems

examples.sampleOutput: 90-second demo showing day-in-life with smart home from wake-up to bedtime

templates.title: Outdoor Living & Landscape Architecture
templates.description: Expansive outdoor living showcase featuring landscape design, entertainment areas, and seamless indoor-outdoor integration

prompt.main: Luxurious outdoor living tour showcasing resort-style amenities and landscape architecture. Opening with aerial view of property grounds, descending to pool area with infinity edge overlooking views. Feature outdoor kitchen, fire features, dining pavilion, zen garden. Showcase landscape lighting transformation from day to evening. Emphasize indoor-outdoor flow through disappearing glass walls and cohesive design elements.

elements.cameraMovement: Sweeping drone shots, low gimbal movements through garden paths, reveal shots of features
elements.subject: Outdoor living spaces, pools, landscape architecture, entertainment areas, gardens
elements.scene: Luxury outdoor environments with multiple activity zones and sophisticated landscaping
elements.motion: Flowing water features, fire elements, gentle plant movement, lifestyle activity
elements.lighting: Golden hour natural light transitioning to dramatic landscape lighting at dusk
elements.atmosphere: Resort-like, relaxing, entertainment-ready, showcasing outdoor lifestyle potential
elements.style: Lifestyle photography aesthetic with architectural precision

technicalSpecs.specialConsiderations: Weather dependent, golden hour timing critical

modifiedElements.subject: Outdoor kitchen, bar, fire features, gathering spaces
modifiedElements.motion: Include lifestyle shots with people entertaining

modifiedElements.subject: Meditation gardens, water features, private retreats

bestPractices: Plan shoots during optimal lighting conditions
Show seasonal variations if possible
Include lifestyle elements (set dining table, lit fire features)
Demonstrate indoor-outdoor connection and flow
Capture both daytime beauty and evening ambiance

examples.sampleOutput: 2-minute tour from sunrise yoga deck through pool entertainment to evening fire pit gathering
